title: Step S-SWQT-0011: HTTP MCP 服务与 Agent 双槽位接入

items.statement: 在同域 /mcp 暴露 swui HTTP MCP：3 个 docs resources、swui.package.get 与 swui.package.installHint；并完成 Host 双槽位与 ADOPTION 文档 handoff。

inScope: examples/portal/server/mcp/ HTTP handler（SSE 或 streamable HTTP，按 MCP SDK 最佳实践）。
MCP initialize instructions：swui vs sw 分工；未安装用 MCP、已安装读 node_modules。
/agent 页面：连接说明与示例 mcp.json。
ADOPTION.md 增加双槽位 .cursor/mcp.json 片段（sw + swui url）。
outOfScope: stdio MCP、sws facade、中心 SWS 代理。
MCP 写操作或 tarball 镜像。

items.researchEvidence: R-SWUI-002 §7 MCP 设计草案；R-SWUI-003 路径 A 双槽位。

externalDependencies: @modelcontextprotocol/sdk 或等价 MCP HTTP 实现

items.problemDefinition: Agent 安装前无法结构化查询 swui 版本与 adoption；与 sw mcp 职责未文档化。
items.requirementsDefinition: 本地或 staging /mcp 响应 tools/list 与 resources/list；package.get 返回 registry 元数据或 stale。
nonGoals: 不在 @swui/ui 包内起 MCP server
items.plainLanguage: Cursor 里加第二个 MCP，装包前就能问版本和怎么接 Tailwind。
items.firstSlice: curl 或 MCP inspector 调用 swui.package.get name=@swui/ui。

readiness.reason: 双槽位路径 A 已确认；registry-client 由 S-SWQT-0010 提供。

items.summary: Exposed same-origin /mcp HTTP MCP with docs resources, package tools, Agent connection page, and ADOPTION dual-slot mcp.json guidance.
validation: REGISTRY_FIXTURE=1 bun run --filter '@swui/portal-example' test:browser (agent + MCP initialize)
items.result: MCP lists 3 doc resources and 2 package tools; swui vs sw division documented; mcp:smoke passes.

cases.name: Agent queries package metadata before install
cases.evidence: swui.package.get and swui.package.installHint return structured registry data.

cases.name: Host configures dual MCP slots
cases.evidence: ADOPTION.md shows sw + swui url in .cursor/mcp.json example.

gateOutcomes.evidence: MCP lives in portal server only; no MCP inside @swui/ui; dual sw+swui slots documented.
mcp-tools unit tests and mcp:smoke cover tool payloads; Playwright covers /agent and MCP initialize.
mcp:smoke encoded in package.json and quality.yml.

items.residualRisk: Production MCP URL depends on ui.swqt.net deploy (blocked-with-reason(infra)).
items.followUp: Deploy portal per examples/portal/DEPLOY.md when infra ready.

items.validationSummary: MCP tool unit tests and mcp:smoke pass; Agent page Playwright cases pass
items.rootMount: Yes - layout v3 stable Step path; no physical archive move.
items.hardPromotionGateSummary: minimum auto-filled by workflow promote; validationSummary provided.
items.testCaseSummary: MCP tool unit tests and mcp:smoke pass; Agent page Playwright cases pass
